summary: Tested all 14 features listed in iteration 135: back button on login/signup, countries API, bank_transactions removed from admin modules, signup bullet fields, change-password endpoint, hero banners moved to Auth & Pages, profile email lock/hint, phone validation. Backend: 16/17 pass (1 skipped as expected). Frontend: all features visually verified and working.

minor.issue: Hint text says 'Min. 8 characters' but backend /auth/change-password requires min 10 chars (from _validate_password_complexity). Frontend modal also validates min 8 before sending, so user gets confusing backend 422 for passwords of length 8-9. Also same issue in Signup.tsx hint text. Consider aligning frontend hint/validation to 'Min. 10 characters' to match backend.

backend_api.must_change_password in partner-login re: SKIPPED (automate-accounts blocked from partner-login, expected behavior)

frontend.Login page back button above heading: PASS - signin-back-btn with text 'Back to partner select' is above h1
frontend.Customer signup back link at top of card: PASS - signup-back-link 'Back to sign in' at y=76.5
frontend.Signup password criteria hint text: PASS - 'Min. 8 characters · at least one uppercase letter · one number · one special character'
frontend.Profile email Lock icon: PASS - SVG Lock icon found near email address label
frontend.Profile email 'Admins can change' hint: PASS - 'Email can only be changed by an admin from the admin panel.'
frontend.Profile phone validation for 'abc': PASS - 'Enter a valid phone number (7-15 digits)' shown
frontend.Admin Auth & Pages: Hero Banners section: PASS - 'HERO BANNERS' section divider visible in screenshot
frontend.Admin Org Info: NO Store Hero Banner: PASS - Store Hero Banner not in Org Info page text
frontend.Admin Org Info: NO Articles Hero Banner: PASS - Articles Hero Banner not in Org Info page text
frontend.Admin Users: Bank Transactions NOT in mo: PASS - not found in page text or modal

action_items: LOW: ForcePasswordChangeModal hint text says 'Min. 8 characters' but backend requires 10. Align to 'Min. 10 characters'. Also frontend modal validates length < 8 locally but backend requires 10. Fix both hint text and local validation in ForcePasswordChangeModal in Login.tsx.
LOW: Signup.tsx password criteria hint also says 'Min. 8 characters' - same 8 vs 10 discrepancy. Update hint to say 'Min. 10 characters'.
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: ForcePasswordChangeModal in Login.tsx checks `newPassword.length < 8` and shows 'Min. 8 characters' hint, but the backend _validate_password_complexity requires >= 10 chars. This means passwords of length 8-9 pass frontend validation but fail with backend 422. Fix: change length check to < 10 and update hint text.

NOTE: The must_change_password test was skipped because automate-accounts is correctly blocked from /auth/partner-login. To test must_change_password in partner-login response, a real partner tenant (e.g. liger-inc) would need to be used. The backend code (auth.py line 257) correctly includes must_change_password in partner_login response.
NOTE: 403 console errors in profile page are expected for admin user (no customer record), not a bug.

test_credentials.context: Two-step login: enter partner code at gateway, then credentials

seed_data_creation: None - tests cleaned up after themselves (signup bullets restored to empty)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter135 tested: back button on login/signup, GET /utils/countries, bank_transactions removed from ADMIN_MODULES, signup_bullet_1/2/3 in website settings, POST /auth/change-password, must_change_password in /me response, Store/Articles Hero Banner moved to Auth & Pages (from Org Info), profile email read-only with Lock icon, phone validation. All pass. Minor issue: ForcePasswordChangeModal hints say 'Min. 8 chars' but backend requires 10. Also Signup.tsx hint has same discrepancy. Partner admin credentials for liger-inc: admin@ligerinc.local / ChangeMe123! (partner code not confirmed, need to look up).
